email.description: The email address of the contact.

fullPhoneNumber.description:
The full phone number of the contact provided as a single string. It will be handled as a landline phone.
**Examples:** "0031 6 11 22 33 44", "+316/1122-3344", "(0031) 611223344"

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the contact.

webAddress.description: The URL of the contact's website.
